[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1110010001 5
2 0101101101 6
3 0010010110 4
4 0011000111 5
5 0100100001 3
6 1001000001 3
7 1110001000 4

61 16 0010100100 3

26 62 0010010110 4 match 3
37 73 0011000111 5 match 0 4
